notes: Single self-contained HTML, no libraries. 5x9 lane grid with 6 plant types (Sunflower, Pea Shooter, Wall-nut, Snow Pea, Repeater, Cherry Bomb) and 5 zombie types (Walker, Conehead, Bucket, Sprinter, Bruiser). Wave-based survival with 10 waves to win. Includes: title screen with sun/zombie decor, difficulty selector (Easy/Normal/Hard), in-game HUD with sun economy + plant tray + cooldowns + wave/score, pause overlay, settings (sound/music/quality/speed), localStorage-persisted top-10 leaderboard, synthesized SFX (place/shoot/hit/zombie/explode/sun/win/lose) + ambient triangle-wave music, animated house backdrop, lane mowers as last line of defense, particle FX, sun tokens (clickable DOM), HP bars, frozen-state zombie tint, screen-shake-ready design.
